name: Hugging Face MCP
description: Discovers AI models, explores datasets, and accesses model documentation and capabilities on Hugging Face — the central hub for open-source ML.

skills.name: Model Discovery
skills.description: Searches and filters Hugging Face's catalog of hundreds of thousands of open-source ML models by task and framework.

skills.name: Dataset Exploration
skills.description: Explores Hugging Face datasets including previews, metadata, and download links for ML training pipelines.

skills.name: Model Documentation
skills.description: Fetches model cards, capabilities, limitations, and usage instructions from the Hugging Face model hub.
